verification_to_evidence.recovery: state stays Verification; re-instantiate; _verify_stage idempotent via _find_evidence_by_idempotency

memory_patch_to_evaluation.recovery: state stays MemoryPatch; re-instantiate; memory.patch idempotent via memory_idempotency

evaluation_to_completed.recovery: state stays Evaluation; re-instantiate; evaluator.evaluate idempotent via evaluation_idempotency

fixes.default_provider_none: mock_model only gates MockProvider; provider_name='mock' without mock_model=true → UnavailableProvider
fixes.no_raw_evidence_store: _verify_stage: evidence.add+idempotency_key replaces try/except+store.find_record; _find_evidence_by_idempotency uses public list() API
fixes.memory_idempotency: memory.patch uses memory_idempotency tracking table with idempotency_key→memory_id→get_record
fixes.evaluation_idempotency: evaluator.evaluate uses evaluation_idempotency tracking table with idempotency_key→evaluation_id→get_record
fixes.5_boundary_crash_recovery: KeyboardInterrupt (BaseException) at all 5 transition boundaries; all 5 re-instantiate and complete
fixes.crash_b_evidence_uncommitted: Tool write completed (report on disk), re-instantiation does not duplicate evidence
fixes.cleaned_old_evidence: 3 stale evidence files removed (v2_pre_pr_integrity_20260718T164401Z, _final_20260718T171038Z, _final_20260718T172053Z); 1 final evidence remains
